statics.name: title
statics.description: The current window title. Setting this automatically calls updateTitle().

statics.name: prefix
statics.description: Prefix prepended to the window title. Setting this automatically calls updateTitle().

statics.name: suffix
statics.description: Suffix appended to the window title. Setting this automatically calls updateTitle().

statics.name: preventClosing
statics.description: If true, cancels the first window close attempt.

statics.name: onClosing
statics.description: Callback fired when the window is closing.

functions.name: resetClosing
functions.description: Resets the internal closing flag so preventClosing works again.

functions.name: resetTitle
functions.description: Resets the window title to the app name and clears prefix and suffix.

functions.name: resetAffixes
functions.description: Clears prefix and suffix. Optionally updates the window title immediately.

functions.name: setWindow
functions.description: Sets the window title and icon. Falls back to mod name or app title if title is null.

functions.name: updateTitle
functions.description: Updates the actual OS window title to prefix + title + suffix.
